  as={"h1"}

  children={"Update file"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/box/{scope}/file/{file_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates a file, can be a name change, a folder move, or both
